stemHtml: Within the PBN concept, what is the flight technical error?

options.a: FTE is the difference between the aircraft's estimated position and its actual position.
options.b: It is part of the total system error, which relates to the air crew or autopilot's ability to follow the defined path or track, including any display error.
options.c: It is a system error that relates to longitudinal accuracy.
options.d: FTE occurs when the path defined in the RNAV system does NOT correspond to the desired path, that is the path expected to be flown over the ground.
